item.title: The crux of the Musk-OpenAI trial so far is that Brockman keeps acting as if selling chatbots and AP...
item.description:
The crux of the Musk-OpenAI trial so far is that Brockman keeps acting as if selling chatbots and API access for profit (which is what they do now) is exactly the same as the original mission (which was explicitly working on the AI safety for public benefit).
They are obviously not the same.
If jury figures that out, OpenAI loses.
--- @GaryMarcus | ❤️ 5 | 🔁 0 | 💬 2 | 👁 423
item.author: @GaryMarcus

item.title: RT @googleaidevs: We’re expanding the Gemini API File Search tool 🔍 with 3 new updates that enable d...
item.author: @Google

item.title:
Don't be that guy.. we all know that guy.
The guy who says it doesn't count if you use AI.
The on...
item.description:
Don't be that guy.. we all know that guy.
The guy who says it doesn't count if you use AI.
The one who gloats when AI makes mistakes, and says "see it's not good enough, it'll never be good enough".
The one who's rooting for failure because they are so mired in their skills - and takes so much pride in the "way I do things, is the only way it'll be in the future".
The one who thinks AI is all slop, since they are stuck using the priors from when ChatGPT came out, and thinks it'll never get better
The one who never tinkers, just expecting magic from day 1. The one who thinks it's a bubble without diving deeper into what's actually happening under the surface.
The one who's constantly on social media hating on launches because they think they are going to be EVEN more part of the permanent underclass.
We all know that guy - don't be that guy. If you can't be curious, the least you can do is appreciate the effort of the folks who are trying.
--- @nikunj | ❤️ 7 | 🔁 1 | 💬 1 | 👁 285
item.author: @nikunj
